issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed.

scenarios.name: Send HTML sprint report with PDF attachment
scenarios.rationale: Treatment posts to /users/{userId}/sendMail with contentType HTML, a base64 fileAttachment carrying the correct @odata.type and contentType, and saveToSentItems true, while baseline produces a hand-rolled SMTP/nodemailer flow that ignores the Graph API contract.

scenarios.name: Auto-organize emails from a client domain
scenarios.rationale: Treatment first creates the folder via POST /users/{userId}/mailFolders and then posts a messageRule with senderContains, moveToFolder, and markAsRead, while baseline tries to script Outlook desktop rules or skips creating the folder programmatically.
